rationale: Mechanical & Aerospace bundles three traditional disciplines (mech, aero, civil structural) plus manufacturing into one level-1 card. Thirteen subspecialties split by physical phenomenon (solid mechanics, fluid mechanics, heat) plus by application area (aerospace, manufacturing, civil, automotive). I kept robotics-as-mechanical (mechatronics overlap) explicitly under EE; here mechanical robotics means mechanism design and locomotion hardware. Additive Manufacturing gets its own card — the 3D-printing-of-everything community is large and identity-distinct.

subspecialties.name: Solid Mechanics
covers: theoretical and applied solid mechanics, elasticity, plasticity, fracture mechanics, contact mechanics, multi-scale mechanics
JMPS, Int J Solids Struct

subspecialties.name: Fluid Mechanics (Engineering)
subspecialties.tagline: CFD, turbulence modeling, multiphase flow, engineering flows.
covers: engineering CFD, turbulence modeling for engineering, multiphase flow, microfluidics engineering, aerodynamics engineering, hydrodynamics
AIAA J, Int J Heat Mass Transfer fluids

subspecialties.name: Thermodynamics & Heat Transfer
subspecialties.tagline: Conduction, convection, radiation, phase change, HVAC.
covers: heat conduction, convection, radiative heat transfer, phase-change heat transfer, building thermal systems, HVAC research, thermal management of electronics

subspecialties.name: Aerospace & Aeronautics
covers: aircraft design, spacecraft design, aerospace propulsion, rocketry, GNC (guidance/nav/control), aerospace structures, hypersonics
AIAA J, J Spacecraft Rockets

subspecialties.name: Propulsion & Energy Conversion
subspecialties.tagline: Combustion, gas turbines, ICE, electrochemical conversion.
covers: combustion, gas turbines, internal combustion engines (incl. hydrogen, ammonia fuels), electric propulsion, fuel cells engineering, energy conversion systems
Combust Flame, Prog Energy Combust Sci

subspecialties.name: Manufacturing & Additive Manufacturing
covers: additive manufacturing (FDM, SLM, DED), CNC machining, welding, injection molding, smart manufacturing, in-situ process monitoring
Add Manuf, J Manuf Sci Eng, CIRP Ann

subspecialties.name: Civil & Structural Engineering
covers: structural engineering, earthquake engineering, transportation engineering, geotechnical engineering, bridge engineering, infrastructure resilience
ASCE, JSE, Earthq Eng Struct Dyn

subspecialties.name: Construction Materials Engineering
covers: concrete engineering, asphalt and pavement engineering, sustainable construction materials, structural durability, smart construction materials
explicitly_excludes: material science of ceramics → Materials Science

subspecialties.name: Automotive & Mobility Engineering
subspecialties.tagline: EVs, autonomous vehicles (hardware), powertrain, mobility systems.
covers: vehicle dynamics, EV powertrain engineering, autonomous vehicle hardware integration, mobility-as-a-service systems engineering, vehicle safety engineering

subspecialties.name: Robotics: Mechanical Design
subspecialties.tagline: Mechanism design, locomotion hardware, exoskeletons, soft robots.
covers: mechanism design, walking and legged robot mechanics, exoskeletons, soft robotics mechanical design, prosthetic devices mechanics

subspecialties.name: Biomechanics
covers: musculoskeletal biomechanics, cardiovascular biomechanics, gait analysis, sports biomechanics, orthopedic device mechanics, rehabilitation biomechanics
J Biomech, Ann Biomed Eng

subspecialties.name: Design, Optimization & Engineering Methodology
subspecialties.tagline: Topology optimization, design for AM, MDO, generative design.
covers: topology optimization, design for additive manufacturing, multi-disciplinary design optimization, generative design, surrogate-based design

subspecialties.name: Marine & Ocean Engineering
subspecialties.tagline: Ship design, offshore structures, marine renewables.
covers: naval architecture, offshore structures, marine renewable energy, underwater vehicles engineering, port engineering

uncovered_concerns: Considered Mechatronics as its own card — split: electronics flavor under EE, mechanical flavor under Robotics: Mechanical Design.
Considered Tribology — folds under Solid Mechanics or Manufacturing.
Considered Wind Energy as separate — folds under Propulsion & Energy Conversion.
